mapper.select: /* ESS 수익 조회 */ select bill_idx, site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, 23 as ess_bdayIn_month, ess_dischg_off_peak, ess_dischg_mid_peak, ess_dischg_max_peak, ess_chg_off_peak, ess_chg_mid_peak, ess_chg_max_peak, ess_chg_incen as pre_ess_incen, ess_chg_incen, ess_dischg_incen, (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen) as ess_incen, (off_peak_rate+mid_peak_rate+max_peak_rate) as peak_rate, ess_dischg_incen as ewp_peak_rate, 90 as rate_per from tb_bill where 1=1 and site_id = #{siteId } and bill_yearm between #{selTermFrom } and #{selTermTo } order by bill_yearm

select site_id, std_timestamp, sum(ess_bdayIn_month) as ess_bdayIn_month, sum(ess_dischg_off_peak) as ess_dischg_off_peak, sum(ess_dischg_mid_peak) as ess_dischg_mid_peak, sum(ess_dischg_max_peak) as ess_dischg_max_peak, sum(ess_chg_off_peak) as ess_chg_off_peak, sum(ess_chg_mid_peak) as ess_chg_mid_peak, sum(ess_chg_max_peak) as ess_chg_max_peak , sum(pre_ess_incen) as pre_ess_incen, sum(ess_incen) as ess_incen, sum(peak_rate) as peak_rate , sum(ewp_peak_rate) as ewp_peak_rate, sum(rate_per) as rate_per from ( select usg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, usg_val as ess_bdayIn_month, usg_val+3400000 as ess_dischg_off_peak, usg_val+(3400000*2) as ess_dischg_mid_peak, usg_val+(3400000*3) as ess_dischg_max_peak , usg_val+(3400000*4) as ess_chg_off_peak, usg_val+(3400000*5) as ess_chg_mid_peak, usg_val+(3400000*6) as ess_chg_max_peak , usg_val+(3400000*7) as pre_ess_incen, usg_val+(3400000*8) as ess_incen, usg_val+(3400000*9) as peak_rate , usg_val+(3400000*10) as ewp_peak_rate, usg_val+(3400000*11) as rate_per from tb_usage where 1=1 and site_id = 'c64b328b'
and std_date between str_to_date('20180820000000','%Y%m%d%H%i%s') and str_to_date('20180820025959','%Y%m%d%H%i%s') ) a where 1=1 group by site_id, std_timestamp
